description.value:
Prerequisite: Not a Strong Hero archetype, Strength 13+, Level 2+

You have learned how to use your strength to focus an aggressive offense.

  • You gain Basic Equipment proficiency.

  • You gain Proficiency in one of the following skills: Athletics, Acrobatics, or Endurance.

  • Before making an Attack, you can declare that you are being Reckless. You gain Advantage on all Melee weapon Attack Rolls, but all opponents attacking you have Advantage on their Attack Rolls. This lasts until the start of your next turn.
